scripts.staging: cross-env test_env=staging tenant=QRH npx playwright test tests/e2e/qrh --ui --grep @QRH @CI --trace on
scripts.prod: cross-env test_env=production tenant=QRH npx playwright test tests/e2e/qrh --grep @QRH @CI
scripts.uat: cross-env test_env=uat tenant=QRH npx playwright test tests/e2e/qrh --grep @QRH @CI
scripts.staging:api: cross-env test_env=staging tenant=QRH npx playwright test tests/api/engine-api/package-api/flight
